name: Wooden Stump Patio Accent Table Black - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of countryside living to your patio with this Wooden Stump Patio Accent Table from Threshold™. Made with a magnesium oxide frame and tabletop, this patio table is designed in a round shape with natural, wood-like detailing for extra flair. Featuring a black hue, this weather-resistant table is great for creating a cozy seating area.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
